name: A payer active on a different Service Provider returns isActive false (privacy)
description:
SP A activates the payer.
SP B queries the status → must get isActive=false to avoid disclosing
that the payer is registered under a competitor SP.
descriptionHtml:
SP A activates the payer.
SP B queries the status → must get isActive=false to avoid disclosing
that the payer is registered under a competitor SP.

labels.name: story
labels.value: Get Activation Status by Fiscal Code
